raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":1.0,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.3},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.6","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"The delegation to ensure solidity centrally involves verifying the logical consistency of the argument chain in the results claims.","R1.3":"Aligning reported claims with evidence like mIoU scores is load-bearing for confirming the artifact's solidity.","R1.4":"Assessing novelty against prior works is central given the SOTA claims in the artifact.","R1.6":"Polishing writing for clarity is peripheral but contributes to overall solidity.","R1.7":"Checking citation accuracy for mentioned prior works is central to solid scholarship.","RX.1":"Disclosing uncertainties in performance gains is central to a solid evaluation.","RX.2":"Avoiding overclaims about SOTA and generality is load-bearing for the delegation.","RX.3":"Adhering to the scope of benchmarks and future work is central to solidity.","RX.4":"Avoiding downstream harms, especially in mentioned medical imaging, is peripheral but relevant.","RX.5":"Ensuring provenance of benchmarks and methods is peripheral to solidity verification."}}

rationale.R1.2: The delegation to ensure solidity centrally involves verifying the logical consistency of the argument chain in the results claims.
rationale.R1.3: Aligning reported claims with evidence like mIoU scores is load-bearing for confirming the artifact's solidity.
rationale.R1.4: Assessing novelty against prior works is central given the SOTA claims in the artifact.
rationale.R1.6: Polishing writing for clarity is peripheral but contributes to overall solidity.
rationale.R1.7: Checking citation accuracy for mentioned prior works is central to solid scholarship.
rationale.RX.1: Disclosing uncertainties in performance gains is central to a solid evaluation.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims about SOTA and generality is load-bearing for the delegation.
rationale.RX.3: Adhering to the scope of benchmarks and future work is central to solidity.
rationale.RX.4: Avoiding downstream harms, especially in mentioned medical imaging, is peripheral but relevant.
rationale.RX.5: Ensuring provenance of benchmarks and methods is peripheral to solidity verification.
